channel.title: self-hosting on Nathan Vaughn
channel.description: Recent content in self-hosting on Nathan Vaughn

item.title: Sun Ultra 24 Server Build
item.description: Background Early last year, I went to my university’s surplus store. I was looking to purchase an old Mac Pro tower with the intent to do a case mod with it, since I knew the surplus store had a few available for cheap and I thought it would be a fun project. However, while looking around, I spotted a beautiful Sun Ultra 24 on the shelf. I quickly decided to purchase that instead for two reasons.

item.title: Self-Hosting with Docker and Argo Tunnel
item.description: Background For the past few years, I’ve rented a VPS to host some web apps for myself. I’ve done this since I’ve lived in college apartments behind a NAT and I wanted to be able to access these services from the outside world. Also, running locally, I wouldn’t be able to setup HTTPS other than self-signed certs. Yuck. However, with Cloudflare’s new service, Argo Tunnel, and poor financial decisions a server I bought on Craigslist, I decided to move my apps to be hosted on-premise.
